description: This commands selects or de-selects all elements in the range. Selected objects can be specified in a range filter by using the selected keyword. Objects that are not selected can be specified in a range filter by using the deselected keyword.

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.description: This commands selects or de-selects all elements in the range. Selected objects can be specified in a range filter by using the selected keyword. Objects that are not selected can be specified in a range filter by using the deselected keyword.

keywords.name: adummy
keywords.description: if a boolean type is specified, and if on, it selects all elements in the range. If off, it de-selects all elements in the range. on is the default if no keyword is given.

keywords.name: new
keywords.description: implies on. This will select elements in the range and automatically de-select elements not in the range.

keywords.name: undo
keywords.description: this will reverse the operation of the last structure hybrid select`. The program keeps a maximum undo stack of size 12.
